summary: The implementation covers all core requirements including backend music library, player controls, browsable library interface, search functionality, playlist management, mobile-optimized UI, and asset display. All acceptance criteria are addressed with no major missing requirements or hallucinated features.

missing_requirements.requirement: Users can remove songs from playlists
missing_requirements.reason: Backend and frontend lack functionality to remove songs from playlists. The backend provides addSongToPlaylist but no removeSongFromPlaylist method. No UI components implement playlist song removal.

hallucinated_features.reason: HomePage automatically adds 8 sample songs when the library is empty. This was not requested in any requirement and represents automatic data seeding behavior.
